name: Jalapeno Cheese and Sausage Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Velveeta cheese; dice at room temperature for 30 minutes
12 oz Can jalapenos; seed and dice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed sauté pan, melt butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add onions, celery, bell pepper, garlic, and diced andouille sausage.
3. Sauté 3-5 minutes or until the vegetables are wilted.
4. Add jalapenos and continue to sauté for an additional 2-3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Pour the contents of the sauté pan into a food processor and blend until smooth.
7. Transfer the blended mixture to a large mixing bowl.
8. Add the diced Velveeta cheese at room temperature (diced for 30 minutes) and mayonnaise.
9. Using a wire whisk, whip the ingredients until smooth and of a dipping sauce consistency.
10. Season with salt, pepper, and Louisiana Gold Pepper Sauce to taste.
11. Sprinkle in chopped parsley.
12. Pour the dip into a decorative bowl and reheat to serving temperature in the microwave if desired.
13. Serve with garlic croutons, toast points, or tortilla chips. This dip may also be served cold.
